result.stderr:
dotnet-qlman 0.9.4
earloc

  -d                    (Default: false) generate types and members even when
                        they are deprecated in the schema

  -n                    (Default: false) use C# 8.0 with nullable-reference-type
                        support

  -j CaseInsensitive    specifies the strategy with which properteis are
                        generated, Default is 'CaseInsensitive'

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.

  value pos. 0          (Default: https://api.spacex.land/graphql/) Uri of the
                        GraphQL endpoint used to generate the client-code

  value pos. 1          (Default: GraphQlClientGenerator.generated.cs) Path to
                        the file the generated client will be saved to

  value pos. 3          (Default: GraphQlClientGenerator.Generated) Namespace
                        used for generated types
